pi_items.source: Consistent across task.json metadata, README.md (10 KB), and verifier.py (line 110: >= 10000 bytes)

pi_items.verified_value: .DDP (DDP is the standard DreamPlan project file format)
pi_items.source: https://www.file-extensions.org/ddp-file-extension-dreamplan-home-design-software-project and multiple file extension databases confirm DDP as the standard DreamPlan project format. DPN files are Depiction Data Files from Depiction software, not DreamPlan.
README.md line 32 and verifier.py line 139: 'passed = score >= 60 and new_image_count >= 3'

pi_items.metadata_value: 3 of 4 image files (implied from verifier logic)
pi_items.source: README.md line 25 and verifier.py line 139: 'Pass threshold: >= 60 points AND at least 3 of 4 image files exist and are new'
task.json description lists 4 required views: front elevation, side elevation, 2D floor plan, 3D overview. Verified in task.json metadata required_files array (first 4 entries).
README.md line 32 and verifier.py line 12-23: Total scoring adds up to 100 points maximum (line 136 in verifier)

DreamPlan documentation (help.nchsoftware.com) references elevation features, but specific elevation view modes (front/side elevation) are not explicitly documented in standard sources. README.md suggests these require discovering DreamPlan's view controls.
Task description states 'DreamPlan is already running with the Contemporary House project loaded', but no public documentation found confirming this is a standard DreamPlan template
task.json difficulty field explicitly states 'very_hard'. README.md justifies this based on multiple required view types and discovery of elevation view mode.

privileged_info_summary: DreamPlan Home Design Software is developed by NCH Software and supports 2D and 3D view modes for home design visualization. The task specifies a minimum image file size of 10,000 bytes and requires exporting 4 different view types (front elevation, side elevation, 2D floor plan, 3D overview) plus saving a project file. Scoring requires >= 60 points out of 100 maximum and >= 3 of 4 images to be created during the task (as determined by file modification timestamps). The task has a very_hard difficulty classification, 660 second timeout, and 80 step limit. IMPORTANT DISCREPANCY: The task requires saving the project as 'construction_docs.dpn', but DreamPlan's standard project file format is .DDP (DDP files), not .DPN. DPN files are associated with Depiction software, not DreamPlan.
